room.caption: [MCK] 10000 things wrong here.
room.creationCode:
locationCheck(93)
backFollow=instance_create(0,0,oBackgroundFollow) backFollow.type=2 backFollow.backSet=backMagicalCastleA backFollow.xMoveScale=0.6 backFollow.yMoveScale=1 backFollow.depth=1499999
gameScene=instance_create(0,0,oEvCh19MainA)
var tempMplay; tempMplay=findMusic(30) playMusic(tempMplay,0,0)

instance.creationCode: sprite_index=sWarpGateStand bShowArrow=false exitType=0 newMapX=512 newMapY=416 toRoom=rMC_A y+=32
bShowArrow=true exitType=1 if global.gameProgress=5000 { newMapX=240 newMapY=336 } else { newMapX=288 newMapY=288 } toRoom=rMC_L image_xscale=4 newArrowPosX=24 newArrowPosY=44
